name: optim-engine
title: OptimEngine - Operations Scheduling Solver
description: Solves Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problems using Google OR-Tools CP-SAT solver. Assign tasks to machines optimally with support for precedence, time windows, machine eligibility, setup times, and multiple objectives. Designed for AI agents via MCP.
seoDescription: AI-powered scheduling optimization for manufacturing and operations. Flexible Job Shop Scheduling with OR-Tools CP-SAT. MCP-native for AI agents.
